title: hymenophyllum tunbrigense var. peltatum
intro: Hymenophyllum tunbrigense var. peltatum, also known as Tunbridge's filmy fern, is a rare and endangered species of fern native to the United Kingdom and Ireland. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for inflammation and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum tunbrigense var. peltatum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea, poultice, or salve, which can be applied topically to affected areas.
